generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystemActuators : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuators (e.g., lighting dimmers, HVAC valves, occupancy sensors) modeled directly within BIM to enable bidirectional control signals from the Digital Twin to physical systems via domain-specific control logic embedded in BIM models (e.g., TwinLight's BIM-centric control framework)."
]

instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lighting dimmer actuator for adaptive lighting control within building zones, configured via BIM-centric control logic for real-time modulation of light intensity based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZoneEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZoneEnvironment
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC valve actuator for zone-specific temperature and airflow control, integrated with BIM models for closed-loop operation optimization."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingZoneEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:isContainedIn BuildingZoneEnvironment
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensors deployed in building zones for real-time monitoring of ambient temperature, feeding data to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono middleware for energy efficiency analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensors measuring relative humidity levels in building environments, synchronized with the Digital Twin for indoor air quality optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensors tracking natural and artificial lighting levels across building zones, enabling adaptive lighting control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensors detecting human presence in building zones, providing occupancy data for space utilization analytics and automated lighting/HVAC adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM model serving as the semantic backbone of the Digital Twin, containing geometric and functional attributes of the building infrastructure (e.g., Living Lab facility)."
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata model enriched with sensor configurations and control logic generated via model-driven transformations from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance OperationalMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic operational metrics (e.g., post-occupancy sensor data) collected from physical building systems for real-time monitoring and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightIntensityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance StaticGeometryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Static geometric data extracted from BIM models representing building structure and layout."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMBuildingModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance FunctionalAttributesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Functional attributes of building systems (e.g., lighting zones, HVAC circuits) derived from BIM models for system-level analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMBuildingModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomServiceIntegration
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange middleware (Eclipse Hono) facilitating bidirectional communication between physical sensors and the Digital Twin for closed-loop control systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Configuration management middleware (Ditto) enabling runtime updates to Digital Twin policies and sensor configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization platform (Unreal Engine) providing real-time monitoring and simulation capabilities for building performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework automating transformations from BIM models to runtime artifacts (sensor metadata, control logic) for Digital Twin deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeMetadataModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing live visualization of building operational metrics (temperature, humidity, light levels, occupancy) via Unreal Engine for immediate feedback."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyPatternInsight, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service using reinforcement learning (via CustomServiceIntegration) to optimize energy consumption and system performance through data-driven decision making."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction, PerformanceTuningAction
]

instance InteractiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive simulation service enabling performance analysis and scenario testing of building systems through virtual prototyping."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignValidationInsight, OperationalScenarioInsight
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration framework allowing DT Engineers to extend functionality via custom analytics and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:enables FunctionalAttributesData
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsService, DomainSpecificControlLogic
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights regarding occupancy patterns across building zones, enabling space utilization optimization and adaptive resource allocation."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental condition analysis (temperature, humidity, light levels) supporting comfort optimization and energy efficiency improvements."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated energy optimization actions triggered by predictive analytics (e.g., adaptive HVAC scheduling, dynamic lighting adjustments) to reduce consumption."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Performance tuning actions based on reinforcement learning models to optimize building system operations across lifecycle phases."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DesignValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance validation insights derived from interactive simulations to verify design compliance and operational feasibility."
]

instance OperationalScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational scenario insights enabling testing of different control strategies and system configurations in a virtual environment."
]

instance CustomAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Custom analytics service providing domain-specific insights generated by extended DT functionality."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DomainSpecificControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control logic implemented via BIM-centric frameworks (e.g., TwinLight) for precise actuation of building systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightingDimmerActuator, HVACValveActuator
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingDimmerActuator, HVACValveActuator,
                 TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightIntensitySensor, OccupancySensor,
                 OperationalMetricsData, StaticGeometryData, FunctionalAttributesData
]

instance LivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingZoneEnvironment,
                 BIMBuildingModel, RuntimeMetadataModel,
                 EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoMiddleware,
                 RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService,
                 InteractiveSimulationService, CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Generated via the DT framework’s **runtime interfaces**, where control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) are transmitted back to physical actuators. This is enabled by the BIM-based control configuration layer (TwinLight) and standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-realtime scale**, with synchronization rates determined by sensor sampling frequencies (e.g., 1-second updates for lighting control in BOREALIS). The framework ensures low-latency data exchange via optimized middleware (Hono/Ditto) for seamless DT-PT alignment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **service-oriented architecture** where BIM models, middleware (Hono/Ditto), visualization (Unreal Engine), and custom services (DT Engineers) interact via standardized APIs. The constellation supports scalability from single-zone to full-building DTs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire **building life cycle**, from **design phase** (BIM models), **construction phase** (device modeling), to **operation phase** (real-time monitoring and adaptive control). The DT evolves dynamically via runtime configuration management (e.g., BOREALIS’ iterative control policy updates)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, ensuring alignment between DT and physical building. Validation involves **verification of BIM-to-DT transformations** and **real-time data synchronization accuracy** (e.g., post-occupancy sensor drift management)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Established via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**, enabling **MQTT-based real-time communication** between physical sensors/actuators and DT components. Protocols support bidirectional data flows with low latency, critical for closed-loop control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, cloud-native service** leveraging standardized extension points for modular hosting. The framework integrates with existing AECO tools (e.g., BIM platforms) via automated transformations, ensuring compatibility with legacy systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to integrate with **external BIM systems** (e.g., via standardized APIs) and **IoT platforms** (e.g., sensor networks) for broader AECO ecosystem collaboration."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly addressed in the documents, but inferred to follow **AECO data governance standards**, where BIM models may be owned by stakeholders, while operational data (e.g., sensor logs) could be managed by DT service providers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Relies on **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for semantic consistency and **open middleware protocols** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperability. Standardized extension points ensure modularity and future extensibility."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Lacks explicit details on security measures, but implied to include **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto) and **safety validation** (e.g., remote control of physical actuators must comply with operational safety guidelines)."
]
